extra.conformance_note: scored oracle frame f330+30 is BEYOND the strict 60-frame screen conformance window — the game only reaches live play later. HONEST descriptive jutari result (the bit-exact jutari re-run IS asserted), not an xitari-parity claim; A is the calibration baseline.

nmf.note: NMF (Lee & Seung multiplicative updates; RAM bytes are non-negative). matched-component fraction tests whether the non-negative PARTS align with single known variables better than PCA's signed components do — the prompt's NMF-vs-PCA question.

oracle_importance.note: oracle importance(i) = max whole-screen break of an EXACT do(cell_i:=0)/do(cell_i:=base+17) intervention re-run on the real ROM (the §1 oracle restricted to the candidate cell + screen). The SAME map A2 / pilot_si.jl score against — the TRUE causal role.

pca.note: PCA (SVD of the centred (T,128) tape). matched-component fraction = #top-k PCs concentrated on ONE known variable (a concept family, OR clock/R-W/vsync) / k. The pilot found ≈0 — PCs mix epiphenomenal high-variance structure across cells.

extra.scales_to_cluster_via: tools/cluster/xai_*.sbatch (E0-3) — the full A1..A8 battery over the core+breadth set; the forward is bit-exact to this HARD path.
extra.substrate: jutari (Julia, HARD) — real-ROM bit-exact path; the importance oracle uses EXACT interventions re-run on the true ROM.
extra.trajectory_trace: directional maze trace (FIRE warmup + cyclic UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT)

triad_nmf.F_note: Spearman(nmf per-cell recovery score, oracle causal importance) over candidate cells
triad_nmf.M_note: 1 − over-claim rate: fraction of nmf-surfaced cells (recovery ≥ q0.5) the oracle says are non-causal (variance≠causal trap)
triad_nmf.S_note: Pearson(nmf recovery, held-out do(base+37) screen break) — sufficiency on the bit-exact re-run
triad_nmf.interpretation: Phase A is the calibration baseline (experiment_design.md §4): dim-reduction surfaces high-VARIANCE axes, which are NOT the causal cells (variance ≠ causal role — present ≠ used). F<1 + low matched-component fraction quantify the departure from the true causal structure.

triad_pca.F_note: Spearman(pca per-cell recovery score, oracle causal importance) over candidate cells
triad_pca.M_note: 1 − over-claim rate: fraction of pca-surfaced cells (recovery ≥ q0.5) the oracle says are non-causal (variance≠causal trap)
triad_pca.S_note: Pearson(pca recovery, held-out do(base+37) screen break) — sufficiency on the bit-exact re-run
